calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2015 Off Calendar

Status Of Filing Of Receipt And Acknowledgment Of Order For The Deposit Of Money Into Blocked Account For The Benefit Of Minor: Jackson Zhang.
Off Calendar Sep-09-2015 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-07-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-27-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Petition To Aprove Compromise Of Disputed Claim Or Pending Action Or Disposition Of Proceeds Of Judgment For Minor Or Person With A Disability
Off Calendar Jun-11-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.
Jenny Jin, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Xue Rong Huang, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Jackson Zhang, present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examinded through Certified Cantonese Interpreter Amy Lo.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $10,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $3,500.00 payable to Hooshmand Law Group.
Reimbursement for medical and all other expenses paid by the petitioner or the petitioner's attorney in the total amount of: $368.55

The total allowance for fees and expenses from the settlement of judgment: $266,487.623,868.55

A net balance of $6,131.45 to be deposited into a blocked account at Wells Fargo Bank, 2300 Irving Street, San Francisco, CA 94122 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on September 15, 2015 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-04-2015 Continued To Jul-22-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
